evals.prompt: 用 $chrome-web-store-submission 帮我写 Chrome 扩展发布信息，只输出中文，包含单一用途、storage/contextMenus/sidePanel 权限理由、远程代码和数据使用。
evals.expected_output: Chinese-only form answers with stable field order and only the requested permissions.
expectations: Single Purpose appears before permission rationale blocks.
Permission blocks include storage, contextMenus, and sidePanel only when they are actually requested.
Remote Code and Data Use sections are present.

evals.prompt: Use $chrome-web-store-submission to generate English-only Chrome Web Store permission justifications and remote code answers for this extension.
evals.expected_output: English-only copy with reviewer-friendly permission explanations.
expectations: Permission explanations are tied to concrete extension features.
Remote-code wording does not make unsupported claims.

evals.prompt: 用 $chrome-web-store-submission 给我一版中英双语的 Chrome Web Store 短描述、详细介绍和 reviewer note。
evals.expected_output: Bilingual listing copy with Chinese first and English second.
expectations: Chinese content appears before English content.
Short Description, Detailed Description, and Reviewer Note are all present.

evals.prompt: 用 $chrome-web-store-submission 检查当前扩展，只给 manifest 里实际申请到的权限写理由；如果没请求 sidePanel，就不要补一个 sidePanel 字段。
evals.expected_output: Requested-permissions-only output with no invented sections.
expectations: Only the permissions present in the extension config are documented.
No sidePanel block is emitted when sidePanel is not requested.

evals.prompt: 如果当前扩展有 host_permissions 和 fetch 请求，就用 $chrome-web-store-submission 生成表单答案，但不要把它写成“数据只保存在本地”。
expectations: Data Use does not claim data stays local only when network activity is present.
Host permissions are explained as access to specific sites or APIs.

evals.prompt: 如果扩展代码里出现 eval 或远程脚本加载迹象，就用 $chrome-web-store-submission 给我一版审核回答，但不要声称没有 remote code。
evals.expected_output: Conservative remote-code wording when risky patterns are present.
expectations: Remote Code section does not claim there is no remote code when eval-like or remote script patterns are found.
Output explicitly asks for manual confirmation when evidence is ambiguous.
